characters.appearance: A full human skeleton with no skin or flesh. The bone structure is realistic and detailed. It has no facial expressions but uses body language to convey emotion.
characters.wardrobe: Initially wears a brown zip-up hoodie over a grey t-shirt, blue jeans, and grey sneakers. Later changes to just a grey t-shirt, blue jeans, and grey sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from anxious and despairing to confident and relaxed.

characters.appearance: Caucasian male, middle-aged, short dark hair, clean-shaven. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police uniform, including a short-sleeved shirt with patches, dark trousers, a peaked police cap, and a duty belt.
characters.demeanor: Initially stern and official, later friendly and welcoming.

characters.appearance: Caucasian female, young adult, dark hair pulled back into a bun or ponytail. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police uniform, short-sleeved shirt with patches, dark trousers.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: सोचो, अगर आपको अचानक USA जाना पड़ जाए? [Imagine, if you suddenly had to go to the USA?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a hypothetical high-stakes scenario.
- Establishes the setting and the protagonist's journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: SOCHO, AGAR ACHANAK USA JANA PAD JAYE?

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: और पहले ही दिन नोटिस मिले कि इंग्लिश नहीं आती, तो वापस इंडिया जाओ! [And on the very first day you get a notice that if you don't know English, go back to India!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the core conflict (language barrier).
- Creates a sense of urgency and fear of rejection.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: PEHLE HI DIN NOTICE MILE KI ENGLISH NAHI AATI TOH WAPAS JAO! OFFICIAL NOTICE

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: घबराने की ज़रूरत नहीं है। बस Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ रोज़ बोलकर प्रैक्टिस करो। [No need to panic. Just download the Supernova app. Practice speaking daily with its AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Pivots from despair to hope by introducing the app.
- Highlights the ease of access and daily practice feature.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: GHABRANE KI ZAROORAT NAHI HAI. SUPERNOVA APP DOWNLOAD KARO AUR AI TUTOR KE SAATH ROZ PRACTICE KARO

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: ये AI ट्यूटर बिना जज किए आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है। आप घर बैठे आराम से इंग्लिश बोलना सीखते हो। [This AI tutor corrects your mistakes without judging. You learn to speak English comfortably from home.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value (AI tutor, no judgment).
- Shows the user practicing in a safe, comfortable environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: YE AI TUTOR BINA JUDGE KIYE GALTIYAN SUDHARE. GHAR BAITHE AARAM SE ENGLISH BOLNA SEEKHO

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: फिर जब पुलिस वापस आए, तो आप पूरे कॉन्फिडेंस से इंग्लिश में बात करो। वो भी इम्प्रेस होकर कहेंगे - "Your English is impressive. Welcome to America." [Then when the police return, you talk in English with full confidence. Even they will be impressed and say - "Your English is impressive. Welcome to America."]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff and resolution.
- Shows the protagonist succeeding and gaining respect through confident English.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: PURE CONFIDENCE SE ENGLISH MEIN BAAT KARO. "YOUR ENGLISH IS IMPRESSIVE. WELCOME TO AMERICA."

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अगर आपको भी बिना डरे इंग्लिश बोलनी है, तो आज ही Supernova ऐप ट्राई करो! [If you also want to speak English without fear, try the Supernova app today!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Strong call to action.
- Encourages the viewer to take the first step towards fluency.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: AGAR AAPKO BHI BINA DARE ENGLISH BOLNI HAI TOH AAJ HI SUPERNOVA APP TRY KARO!
